arts.ttl: Liverpool striker Darwin Nunez spotted celebrating in ex-Everton star's face after Uruguay score 101st-minute winner to beat Colombia
arts.sum: Ugarte's last-gasp goal sparked wild celebrations, both on the field and in the stands, with Uruguayan striker Nunez's reaction caught on camera.
